caption.text: TABLE 1: SECURITY AND PRIVACY CONTROL FAMILIES

footnote.text: 25 Of the 20 control families in NIST SP 800-53, 17 are aligned with the minimum security requirements in [FIPS 200]. The Program Management (PM), PII Processing and Transparency (PT), and Supply Chain Risk Management (SR) families address enterprise-level program management, privacy, and supply chain risk considerations pertaining to federal mandates emergent since [FIPS 200].

rationale: The visible Table 1 region materializes as one table, its caption remains a caption with table_caption semantic role, footnote 25 remains a footnote_group, and selected table cells do not leak as standalone body blocks.
